<<VEGETABLE>> <<ACTOR>> <<BOTTOM>> <<PACK>> <<SICK>> <<COST>>  

1. DERIVE THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS (MLEs) FOR THE PARAMETERS MU_X, MU_Y, SIGMA_X2, SIGMA_Y2, AND SIGMA_XY GIVEN THE DATA.  

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS MU_X, MU_Y, SIGMA_X2, SIGMA_Y2, AND SIGMA_XY ARE GIVEN BY THE FOLLOWING FORMULAS:  

MU_X = [MEAN OF X_i]  
MU_Y = [MEAN OF Y_i]  
SIGMA_X2 = [VARIANCE OF X_i]  
SIGMA_Y2 = [VARIANCE OF Y_i]  
SIGMA_XY = [COVARIANCE OF X_i AND Y_i]  

2. TO TEST THE HYPOTHESIS THAT THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE, FORMULATE AND CONDUCT A HYPOTHESIS TEST USING THE DERIVED MLEs. STATE THE NULL AND ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESES, THE TEST STATISTIC, AND THE REJECTION CRITERIA AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF ALPHA = 0.05. THE RESPONSE MUST CONTAIN AT LEAST 8 PLACEHOLDERS REPRESENTED BY SQUARE BRACKETS, SUCH AS [ADDRESS]. IN YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE, REFRAIN FROM THE USE OF ANY COMMAS. ENCLOSE EVERY WORD IN YOUR RESPONSE WITHIN SQUARE BRACKETS. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. WRAP EVERY WORD BIGRAM IN DOUBLE ANGULAR BRACKETS, SUCH AS <<I AM>> <<AT HOME>> <<WITH MY>> <<CUTE DOG>>.  

<<NULL HYPOTHESIS>>: [THE DRUG HAS NO EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE]  
<<ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS>>: [THE DRUG DOES HAVE A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE]  
<<TEST STATISTIC>>: [T-SQUARE]  
<<REJECTION CRITERIA>>: [T-VALUE GREATER THAN 1.96 OR LESS THAN -1.96]  
<<SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL>>: [0.05]  
<<STATISTICAL DECISION>>: [REJECT NULL HYP
